Pastureto the Table

Recipes built from the pasture outward — from a family farm in Arcadia, Florida, where every ingredient is raised with intention and care.

Explore the Recipes
The Clarkson Family

Grove Ladder Farm · Arcadia, FL

"We as a society have forgotten that a farmer is a craftsman of the highest order, a kind of artist."

— Wendell Berry

Our Family · Our Farm

Food that knows where it came from

The Clarkson family farms the land in Arcadia, Florida — raising pastured poultry, 100% grass-fed beef and lamb, heritage hogs, and keeping bees that produce raw wildflower honey from the surrounding Arcadia countryside.

These recipes were built from the pasture outward. Starting with the animals we raise and the honey our bees produce, then finding the simplest, most delicious paths from field to fork. Every recipe links directly to the products you need — no substitutes. Use the real thing and taste what honest farming actually tastes like.

22+ Farm Recipes
